completed_tasks.name: Post-plan: chat tool-call regression fixes (empty reply, generic action types)
canvas_action schema content-shape documentation + multi-call guidance
Web search heuristic widened to travel/lifestyle keywords
Markdown GFM extension (tables / task lists / strikethrough)
Rich card UI rendering (plan / todo / weather / map / link / code)
Loosen input/output caps for Qwen3.6 Plus 991K/64K window
Web search: agent_max strategy + forced_search + enable_citation + default-on heuristic

remaining_tasks.name: Plan 05 commit + 21-05-SUMMARY.md (Plan 05 already shipped in 807e529 but no SUMMARY.md yet)
Update STATE.md + ROADMAP.md (mark Phase 21 ✅, advance v3.1 to 1/6)
Verify agent_max strategy is accepted by qwen3.6-plus in production (fall back to agent if rejected)

blockers.description: Plan 06 marked autonomous: false — needs npm run dev running concurrently with npm run test:chat
agent_max search_strategy may not be supported on every qwen3.6-plus snapshot — needs production smoke test
blockers.workaround: fall back to search_strategy: 'agent' or 'max' if API rejects

human_actions_pending.action: Browser smoke test the parity-with-Qwen improvements
human_actions_pending.context: Confirm agent_max search fires + GFM tables render + plan card shows steps when asking '三天深圳行程' or similar

human_actions_pending.action: Start npm run dev in a terminal so resuming agent can run Plan 06 E2E tests

decisions.decision: Switch search_strategy from turbo to agent_max
decisions.rationale: Match official Qwen app multi-round agentic search ('几十个网页')

decisions.decision: Default web search ON with negation block-list
decisions.rationale: Generality over allow-list — covers any non-trivial query, only suppresses chitchat / canvas-ops / pure code / pure creative
Inline source markers so the answer is verifiable

decisions.decision: Raise message history depth 8 → 40 turns, per-msg 1200 → 8000 chars
decisions.rationale: Qwen3.6 Plus has 991K input window — old caps wasted it
optionTemplate previously had no place for plan.steps/todo.items/etc — cards looked empty even with full content payload

decisions.decision: Use micromark-extension-gfm for chat reply rendering
decisions.rationale: Bare CommonMark micromark@4 doesn't emit tables/task-lists/del — Qwen-style answers stayed unrendered

decisions.decision: Document content shapes per nodeType in canvas_action tool schema
decisions.rationale: Model needs to know content.steps shape; without it create_plan fired with only a title

next_action: Resume with /gsd-resume-work or /gsd-execute-phase 21. Browser-verify the parity improvements first (agent_max search, GFM tables, rich plan cards), then write 21-05-SUMMARY.md, then start Plan 06 (needs npm run dev running).
context_notes: Wave 3 of phase 21 was originally about Plan 05 fallback feedback. After that shipped, the user pushed for parity with the official Qwen app on three axes: web search invocation, rich markdown rendering, answer depth. This session closed all three: agent_max strategy + forced_search + enable_citation (commit 807c2db); GFM tables/task lists/del rendered via micromark-extension-gfm (0323a67); and the biggest one — rich card UI rendering so plan/todo/weather/map/link/code cards show their content payload (be10a88). Also loosened input/output caps to match Qwen3.6 Plus 991K/64K window (5d336e5 + 4f60c16). Remaining: Plan 06 E2E (needs dev server), retroactive Plan 05 SUMMARY.md, phase verification + STATE/ROADMAP update.
